history.action: Initialized SDLC workflow. Token minted and assigned to Analyst.
Completed Phase 1. User stories and acceptance criteria finalized.
Completed Phase 2. ADRs, system architecture, and JSON schemas finalized.
Completed Phase 3. Full SvelteKit app, engine, stores, components, CI/CD, and unit tests created.
Completed Phase 4. All unit, integration, and E2E tests created and passing. QA sign-off granted.
Sprint 1 closed. Hotfixes merged. Sprint 2 opened. Architect confirmed game-config.schema.json covers Spider Solitaire without changes. Token passed to Developer.

Sprint 2 Spider Solitaire implementation complete. Delivered: DescendingAnySuitStrategy, dealPattern engine extension, spider/config.json (2 decks, 10 cols, 104 cards), 26 unit tests (71 total passing). CSP bug fixed (empty page on dev). Feature branch feature/spider-solitaire pushed to origin. Handed off to QA.

FreeCell requirements complete. Created freecell-user-stories.md (7 user stories with Gherkin scenarios), freecell-acceptance-criteria.md (13 acceptance criteria marked [Final]), freecell-problem-statement.md (scope, constraints, dependencies). Identified schema gaps: need 'cells' pile type, 'descending-alternating-color' strategy, one-time deal pattern. Ready for Architect schema design.
